vulnerabilities.description: XML parsing uses xml.Unmarshal without explicit XXE protection configuration. While Go 1.17+ disables external entities by default, explicit decoder configuration is recommended for defense-in-depth against XML External Entity attacks in SAML responses.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add explicit XML decoder configuration: decoder := xml.NewDecoder(reader). Set decoder.Strict to true and consider adding maximum entity size limits.

owasp_checks.detail: No SQL injection vectors found - input validation in place, no raw SQL visible
No XSS vectors found - provided code is backend-only, no HTML output rendering
XXE risk mitigated - Go 1.17+ disables external entities by default, though explicit config recommended
Argon2id with OWASP-compliant parameters (64MB, 3 iterations, 4 threads, 32-byte key)
No authentication misconfigurations found - JWT, OIDC, SAML properly implemented
No XSS vectors in provided code
Cryptography properly implemented - uses Argon2id, crypto/rand, golang-jwt
No authentication/authorization issues in provided code
No security logging/monitoring issues - telemetry with OpenTelemetry
No SSRF vectors in provided code
